query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "moebius: 0.2b lightweight image inpainting framework with 10b-level pe" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review as it addresses the core domain of image inpainting and provides foundational methodology (low-rank decomposition, nonlocal self-similarity) that serves as a canonical reference for the "Moebius" framework mentioned in the user's question, satisfying criteria (d) and (b).
